creator: alex.pavlovic@devradius.com
text:
According to:

http://www.freshports.org/devel/py-gitpython/

On 08 Mar 2014 09:49:50, it seems Rene deleted this port as he mentioned there was not active website. He must have been looking at old link. This project is actively maintained. The proper link has been moved and it is below.

https://gitorious.org/git-python

This is incorrect website link: http://gitorious.org/projects/git-python/

Please resurrect this port back.


Thank you.
